sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, ts String, value Float32, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 'A', 1.23, reinterpretAsDateTime(10000)), (2, '', 3.45, reinterpretAsDateTime(0)), (3, 'B', NULL, reinterpretAsDateTime(5000));
SELECT id, value, reinterpretAsDateTime(CAST(value AS UInt32)) AS reinterpret_value FROM test_data WHERE reinterpret_value < reinterpretAsDateTime(20000) AND ts = '';

SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, reinterpretAsDateTime(50) AS reinterpret_ts FROM test_data WHERE reinterpretAsDateTime(0) < reinterpretAsDateTime(CAST(ts AS UInt32))) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

SELECT id, ts, value FROM test_data t1 JOIN (SELECT id, reinterpretAsDateTime(2500) AS join_reinterpret FROM test_data WHERE value < 4.0) t2 ON reinterpretAsDateTime(CAST(ts AS UInt32)) < join_reinterpret;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsDateTime(ABS(value)) AS abs_reinterpret FROM test_data WHERE ts IS NOT NULL ORDER BY abs_reinterpret;
SELECT id, AVG(value) FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING AVG(value) < CAST(reinterpretAsDateTime(15000) AS Float32);
INSERT INTO temp_test_data SELECT id, ts, reinterpretAsDateTime(CAST(value AS UInt32)) AS corrected_value, created_at FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT t1.id FROM test_data t1 LEFT JOIN temp_test_data t2 ON t1.created_at < reinterpretAsDateTime(1) OR t2.created_at IS NULL;
